LanguageData.RICS.PawnRacesHelp.Title: Pawn Race Settings Help
LanguageData.RICS.PawnRacesHelp.Overview: Pawn Race & Xenotype Settings Overview Configure which races and xenotypes viewers can purchase, set prices (absolute silver), age ranges, and enable/disable options.
LanguageData.RICS.PawnRacesHelp.XenotypePricing: ⚠️ XENOTYPE PRICING — IMPORTANT UPDATE Prices are now absolute silver values (Race Base + Xenotype Price). • Use the Reset button next to each xenotype (or Reset All Prices in header) after mod updates. Click Reset on every xenotype you want updated to the new gene-based system!
